mapper.select: select boardName, boardContent, readCount, B.fk_categoryNo, name, boardNo from board B join users C on B.fk_id = C.id order by boardNo desc

select A.* from ( select lead(boardNo) over(order by boardNo desc) as preNo ,lead(boardName) over(order by boardNo desc) as preName , lag(boardNo) over(order by boardNo desc) as nextNo , lag(boardName) over(order by boardNo desc) as nextName ,boardNo, boardName, boardContent, fk_id from board ) A where A.boardno = #{boardNo}
